_comment: Data-driven config for the post-cart-build browser flow used by `doordash orders reorder --confirm`. The cart itself is built server-side via the `reorderOrder` GraphQL mutation in client.py; this file describes ONLY the steps required to submit that cart through the checkout UI. Dry-run does not touch the browser at all -- it stops after the API call. {cart_uuid} is substituted with the cart UUID returned by the mutation before navigation.

steps.description: Navigate to the checkout page for the cart we just built. DoorDash uses query-string-based cart routing; the cart UUID returned by `reorderOrder` is the orderCartId.
Cloudflare Turnstile may interstitially gate checkout. Allow up to 120s for the widgets and the SPA loading panel to disappear before clicking Place Order.
Wait until the Place Order button appears on the checkout page.
Click the Place Order button. Only runs when --confirm is passed. This step actually charges the saved payment method.
After submission, DoorDash navigates to the order confirmation page. Wait for that signal so we can extract the new order id.
